name: Cardboard VR glasses
summary: Virtual Reality glasses made of cardboard. Just install the app Cardboard on the operating system of your smartphone, insert the smartphone in the slot and now you can discover all avenues of the virtual world through...
descriptionLong: Virtual Reality glasses made of cardboard. Just install the app Cardboard on the operating system of your smartphone, insert the smartphone in the slot and now you can discover all avenues of the virtual world through head movements.

name: Rounded USB hub with 4 port
summary: Plastic, rounded USB hub with four ports.
descriptionLong: Plastic, rounded USB hub with four ports.

name: Cable box
summary: 3 in 1 charging cable with USB adapter, micro USB adapter, Android and iOS charging cable, in a plastic box.
descriptionLong: 3 in 1 charging cable with USB adapter, micro USB adapter, Android and iOS charging cable, in a plastic box.

name: Keychain with USB charging cable
summary: 3 in 1 plastic keychain with USB port, Android, and iOS charging cables, perfect for when you are on-the-go! We will engrave your logo on the black metal piece, the engraving lights up during the charging process.
descriptionLong: 3 in 1 plastic keychain with USB port, Android, and iOS charging cables, perfect for when you are on-the-go! We will engrave your logo on the black metal piece, the engraving lights up during the charging process.

name: Extendable charging cable with 3 plugs
summary: Extendable charging cable in a plastic housing with a USB plug and an iOS, C-Type and Micro USB connection.
descriptionLong: Extendable charging cable in a plastic housing with a USB plug and an iOS, C-Type and Micro USB connection.

name: Bamboo phone holder
summary: Bamboo Phone holder for sticking together with an opening space for the charging cable. Perfect for every desk.
descriptionLong: Bamboo Phone holder for sticking together with an opening space for the charging cable. Perfect for every desk.

name: Laptop webcam-cover
summary: Ultra thin cover for webcam of computer, laptop, MacBook or iMac with 3M adhesive on the back for a secure hold. Protect yourself and your privacy.
descriptionLong: Ultra thin cover for webcam of computer, laptop, MacBook or iMac with 3M adhesive on the back for a secure hold. Protect yourself and your privacy.

name: Mobile-cam cover
summary: Cover for the mobile phone camera, easy to open and close and with 3M adhesive on the back, for secure and permanent attachment.
descriptionLong: Cover for the mobile phone camera, easy to open and close and with 3M adhesive on the back, for secure and permanent attachment.

name: Laptop tray with mousepad
summary: Laptop tray made of bamboo with a PU mousepad and a mobile phone holder. Your new mobile workplace offers everything you need.
descriptionLong: Laptop tray made of bamboo with a PU mousepad and a mobile phone holder. Your new mobile workplace offers everything you need.

name: Smartphone bag
summary: Silicone holder for attaching to the back of your smartphone. There's enough space for business cards, credit cards, money, and more.
descriptionLong: Silicone holder for attaching to the back of your smartphone. There's enough space for business cards, credit cards, money, and more.

name: Bamboo tablet and smartphone holder
summary: Bamboo tablet and smartphone holder, provides a safe hold for the desk or on the go.
descriptionLong: Bamboo tablet and smartphone holder, provides a safe hold for the desk or on the go.

name: Mobile phone holder
summary: Universal mobile phone holder made of bendable metal with protective silicone covering. It can be fixed to the socket during charging and shows your logo even when the smartphone/mobile phone is in the holding.
descriptionLong: Universal mobile phone holder made of bendable metal with protective silicone covering. It can be fixed to the socket during charging and shows your logo even when the smartphone/mobile phone is in the holding.

name: Nylon writing case with zipper
summary: The writing case made of 190T nylon is available in three trendy colours and provides enough space inside for a modern tablet PC, includes a lined writing pad and a zipper compartment outside. We will print your logo ...
descriptionLong: The writing case made of 190T nylon is available in three trendy colours and provides enough space inside for a modern tablet PC, includes a lined writing pad and a zipper compartment outside. We will print your logo on the cover.

name: Screen protector
summary: Liquid screen protector for smartphones, smartwatches, and tablets. The liquid glass seal makes your display a lot more resistant than a protective film and is completely invisible.
descriptionLong: Liquid screen protector for smartphones, smartwatches, and tablets. The liquid glass seal makes your display a lot more resistant than a protective film and is completely invisible.

name: Inductive charger
summary: Plastic induction charger, charge your smartphone with cordless technology. The wireless charger also works as a stand for your smartphone.
descriptionLong: Plastic induction charger, charge your smartphone with cordless technology. The wireless charger also works as a stand for your smartphone.

name: 3in1 wheatstraw charging cable
summary: 3 in 1 wheatstraw charging cable, with USB charging cable, Micro USB, C-Type and 8 pin Plug. The logo will shine during the charging process.
descriptionLong: 3 in 1 wheatstraw charging cable, with USB charging cable, Micro USB, C-Type and 8 pin Plug. The logo will shine during the charging process.

name: Extralong charging cable
summary: 4in1 charging cable made of nylon, with a length of 120cm and four different connections. USB, micro-USB, USB-C and lightning.
descriptionLong: 4in1 charging cable made of nylon, with a length of 120cm and four different connections. USB, micro-USB, USB-C and lightning.

name: Retractable charging cable
summary: Retractable charging cable with USB, C-Type, Mini USB and iOS connectorr. Made of plastic with bamboo decoration.

name: Recycled aluminium USB hub
summary: USB hub made from recycled aluminium with one USB-C port and 3 USB ports.
descriptionLong: USB hub made from recycled aluminium with one USB-C port and 3 USB ports.

name: Charging cable
summary: Long charging cable (1.2m) with bamboo plate and C-type, micro USB and iOS adapters. Input / output 5V/2A.

name: Magnetic quick-charging cable
summary: Magnetic quick-charging cable made from recycled aluminium. The powerful 60W output allows smartphones or tablets to be charged quickly and the magnets in the cable ensure that it is always perfectly wound up.
descriptionLong: Magnetic quick-charging cable made from recycled aluminium. The powerful 60W output allows smartphones or tablets to be charged quickly and the magnets in the cable ensure that it is always perfectly wound up.

name: Charging cable with a light function
summary: 3-in-1 charging cable with a light function in the middle and a length of 120cm. The charging cable has a USB-C, micro-USB and iOS output and a USB type A and C input. The engraved logo lights up during the charging p...
descriptionLong: 3-in-1 charging cable with a light function in the middle and a length of 120cm. The charging cable has a USB-C, micro-USB and iOS output and a USB type A and C input. The engraved logo lights up during the charging process.

name: Bluetooth key tracker
summary: Bluetooth tracker for quickly finding keys or bags using the Find My® app, which is available exclusively for iPhone® devices. AirTag®-type Bluetooth tracking device. Includes a replaceable CR2032 battery.
descriptionLong: Bluetooth tracker for quickly finding keys or bags using the Find My® app, which is available exclusively for iPhone® devices. AirTag®-type Bluetooth tracking device. Includes a replaceable CR2032 battery.

name: 3 m fast charging cable
summary: 3 m fast charging cable (60W) with USB-C connection, attachable USB adapter, and USB-C output. The cable features a PET coating to prevent cable breakage.
descriptionLong: 3 m fast charging cable (60W) with USB-C connection, attachable USB adapter, and USB-C output. The cable features a PET coating to prevent cable breakage.

name: Thick cleaning cloth
summary: Thick microfiber cleaning cloth (400 gsm) with a different texture on each side. Ideal for gentle cleaning of glasses and all delicate surfaces.
descriptionLong: Thick microfiber cleaning cloth (400 gsm) with a different texture on each side. Ideal for gentle cleaning of glasses and all delicate surfaces.

summary: Microfibre cloth suitable for cleaning glasses, glass surfaces or LCD screens.

name: RPET gloves
summary: Gloves made of RPET and soft acrylic with specially manufactured tips on the thumb, index and middle finger, which enable the operation of smartphones without taking off the gloves, an ideal winter gadget.
descriptionLong: Gloves made of RPET and soft acrylic with specially manufactured tips on the thumb, index and middle finger, which enable the operation of smartphones without taking off the gloves, an ideal winter gadget.

summary: Bamboo pendant with key ring and cord that can also be used as a mobile phone holder.

descriptionLong: Using your smartphone while keeping your hands warm during winter - this is no problem with these touch screen gloves made of soft acryl with conductive tips on the thumb and index fingers.

name: Magnetic 100W fast charging & data cable
summary:
Pierre Cardin magnetic 100W fast charging and data cable. The cable
is made of aluminum, braided with nylon, always carefully folded
thanks to the magnet. Cable connectors: input USB-A, USB-C; output
USB-C, Ligntning....
descriptionLong:
Pierre Cardin magnetic 100W fast charging and data cable. The cable
is made of aluminum, braided with nylon, always carefully folded
thanks to the magnet. Cable connectors: input USB-A, USB-C; output
USB-C, Ligntning. The length of the cable is 100 cm. Packed in a gift
box, comes with a certificate of authenticity.

name: Crossbody phone holder lanyard
summary: An elegant Pierre Cardin crossbody phone holder lanyard. The lanyard has an integrated 60W fast charging and data cable, input and output with USB Type-C. It includes two safety buckles behind the neck. Packed in a gi...
descriptionLong: An elegant Pierre Cardin crossbody phone holder lanyard. The lanyard has an integrated 60W fast charging and data cable, input and output with USB Type-C. It includes two safety buckles behind the neck. Packed in a gift box with a certificate of authenticity.
